name: Walnut Apricot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the baking powder, salt, and flour together; sift again.
2. Add the sugar to the sifted ingredients and mix thoroughly.
3. Incorporate the apricots and walnut meats.
4. Combine the milk, egg, and butter in a separate bowl and beat lightly.
5. Mix this liquid mixture into the dry ingredients until well blended.
6. Pour the batter into a buttered loaf pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for one hour.
